location.name: Art appraisers in Columbus, Ohio
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Columbus, Ohio.

listedAppraisers.name: Amelia Jeffers Auctioneers & Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Amelia Jeffers Auctioneers & Appraisers provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Art (all periods), Antiques, Hard-to-value assets, Estate settlements, Expert witness testimony. With 20+ years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Amelia Jeffers, Auctioneers & Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Amelia Jeffers, Auctioneers & Appraisers offers fine art appraisal services serving Columbus, OH. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Expert Witness, Litigation Support, Authentication. listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in General personal property appraisals, Real estate appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare Books. With Since 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Pennypacker Appraisals and Art Advisory, Ltd.
listedAppraisers.description: Pennypacker Appraisals and Art Advisory, Ltd. is an independent personal property appraisal firm based in Columbus, Ohio. They provide appraisal services for personal property including fine art, furniture, decorative arts, and collectibles, as well as advice on what to do with personal property. All services comply with USPAP.
